title: Harness exemplars characterized — WASC's deterministic prompt pipeline and SYNTH's failure-derived deny surface, with the portable pattern set
question: What enforcement mechanisms made the WASC and MUSE/SYNTH harnesses predictable and non-bypassable, what does each exemplar's model consist of, and which mechanisms are portable patterns for a process harness in this project?
method: Read-only characterization of both exemplar projects (hooks, renderers, gate scripts, ledgers, mandates, state files, templates — load-bearing lines quoted verbatim), per-exemplar analysis of shape / enforcement points / bypass surface / operator experience, and a comparison treating the variant's delta as design intent.
findings_summary: Both exemplars share one architecture: an LLM orchestrator whose canonical process lives in committed text/code, whose subagent inputs are built by deterministic renderers with mandates inlined (subagents do not receive the UserPromptSubmit injection), whose commits are gated by the full test suite running INSIDE a PreToolUse hook, whose progress lives in append-only ledgers plus derived synthesis, and whose completion claims are verified by a separate adversarial agent and exit codes, with the human as scope authority. WASC (the first model): the phase is the enforced unit; a judgment-free renderer ('cat + sed. No judgment. No LLM.') compiles phase MDs + inlined mandates into IMPL/AUDIT contracts; AUDIT ends with a literally-parsed 'Total findings: N' line and GO/NO-GO is computed, not judged; only the commit is hard-gated — sequencing is codified but obeyed. SYNTH (the variant): enforcement moved upstream to five tool boundaries — plan entry gated on an advance-only-on-clean spec-audit watermark, dispatch serialized one-unit-per-prompt by renderer contract, ledger writes triple-shielded, and implementation commits BLOCKED-BY-DEFAULT without a user-opened, git-ancestry-anchored, expiring authorization grant; every guard traces to a mined failure ID with historical counts; every hook declares its fail-open (absent infrastructure) / fail-closed (gated condition) split; where prevention is impossible (hooks cannot prove authorship) the design pairs the bypass with forensic detection (a state-currency auditor cross-checking claude-history) and user-only self-expiring overrides; the harness regression-tests its own necessity. The variant's delta = the design intent: procedure-as-refusal over procedure-as-prose, authorization as a first-class mechanical object, rules justified by mined incident data, honest threat modeling with detection where prevention fails, and a self-auditing harness.
stale_conditions: Either exemplar's harness mechanisms change materially after 2026-07-06
FEAT-013 reaches implementation (the design decisions supersede the exemplar survey as the operative reference)
